_comment: KUT climate overlay example (Phase 192 E3). Copy to <project>/_BIM_COORD/climate_data.json to override the corporate Kampala entry with VERIFIED ASHRAE 2021 design values once the engineer-of-record confirms them against the Entebbe station (HUEN / WMO 636800). The corporate STING_CLIMATE_DATA.json already ships a Kampala entry that resolves via the ProjectInformation.Address fuzzy-match (address containing 'Kampala'); this overlay is only needed if the corporate estimate must be replaced. The HVAC pressure-class audit + block-load air-density use the cooling 0.4% (99.6 percentile) dry-bulb.

sites.label: Kampala
sites.source: PROJECT OVERRIDE — replace with engineer-confirmed ASHRAE 2021 Entebbe (HUEN/636800) design values
